2603.14229.title: Agentic DAG-Orchestrated Planner Framework for Multi-Modal, Multi-Hop Question Answering in Hybrid Data Lakes
2603.14229.paper_summary: Enterprises increasingly need natural language (NL) question answering over hybrid data lakes that combine structured tables and unstructured documents. Current deployed solutions, including RAG-based systems, typically rely on brute-force retrieval from each store and post-hoc merging. Such approaches are inefficient and leaky, and more critically, they lack explicit support for multi-hop reasoning, where a query is decomposed into successive steps (hops) that may traverse back and forth between structured and unstructured sources. We present Agentic DAG-Orchestrated Transformer (A.DOT) Planner, a framework for multi-modal, multi-hop question answering, that compiles user NL queries into directed acyclic graph (DAG) execution plans spanning both structured and unstructured stores. The system decomposes queries into parallelizable sub-queries, incorporates schema-aware reasoning, and applies both structural and semantic validation before execution. The execution engine adheres to the generated DAG plan to coordinate concurrent retrieval across heterogeneous sources, route intermediate outputs to dependent sub-queries, and merge final results in strict accordance with the plan's logical dependencies. Advanced caching mechanisms, incorporating paraphrase-aware template matching, enable the system to detect equivalent queries and reuse prior DAG execution plans for rapid re-execution, while the DataOps System addresses validation feedback or execution errors. The proposed framework not only improves accuracy and latency, but also produces explicit evidence trails, enabling verification of retrieved content, tracing of data lineage, and fostering user trust in the system's outputs. On benchmark dataset, A.DOT achieves 14.8% absolute gain in correctness and 10.7% in completeness over baselines.
2603.14229.paper_summary_zh: 企業越來越需要在結合結構化表格和非結構化文件的混合數據湖上進行自然語言 (NL) 問答。當前部署的解決方案，包括基於 RAG 的系統，通常依賴於從每個存儲中進行強力檢索和事後合併。這些方法效率低下且存在漏洞，更重要的是，它們缺乏對多跳推理的明確支持，其中查詢被分解為可能在結構化和非結構化來源之間來回穿梭的連續步驟（跳躍）。我們提出了 Agentic DAG-Orchestrated Transformer (A.DOT) Planner，這是一個用於多模態、多跳問答的框架，將用戶的 NL 查詢編譯成跨越結構化和非結構化存儲的有向無環圖 (DAG) 執行計劃。該系統將查詢分解為可並行處理的子查詢，結合了模式感知推理，並在執行前應用結構和語義驗證。執行引擎遵循生成的 DAG 計劃協調異構來源的並發檢索，將中間輸出路由到依賴的子查詢，並根據計劃的邏輯依賴嚴格合併最終結果。先進的緩存機制，結合了意義相似的模板匹配，使系統能夠檢測等效查詢並重用先前的 DAG 執行計劃以快速重新執行，而 DataOps 系統則解決驗證反饋或執行錯誤。所提出的框架不僅提高了準確性和延遲，還產生了明確的證據鏈，能夠驗證檢索內容、追踪數據來源，並增強用戶對系統輸出的信任。在基準數據集上，A.DOT 在正確性上比基線提高了 14.8% 的絕對增益，在完整性上提高了 10.7%。
2603.14229.author: Kirushikesh D B et.al.
2603.14229.authors: Kirushikesh D B, Manish Kesarwani, Nishtha Madaan, Sameep Mehta, Aldrin Dennis, Siddarth Ajay, Rakesh B R, Renu Rajagopal, Sudheesh Kairali
